title: UI
content_html:
UI

This is the target framework doc for the site’s shared UI system.

It exists to unify guidance that is currently split between:

  • UI Framework
  • Studio UI Framework
  • stable rules currently buried in Studio UI Rules And Decision Log

Direction

UI guidance should be organized around the design problem and affected surfaces, not around an artificial split between Studio and the public site.

Use one framework vocabulary for:

  • public pages
  • docs viewer pages
  • Library pages
  • Studio pages
  • local-service-backed command pages

Some primitives and patterns will only appear on Studio routes today. That does not make them Studio-only design rules. It means the current affected surface is Studio.

Documentation Model

Use this hierarchy:

  • Design remains the high-level section index.
  • This UI doc becomes the site-wide UI framework and migration target.
  • UI Catalogue remains the index for named primitives, composition patterns, and live reference pages.
  • Primitive docs live under ui-catalogue as one doc per primitive.
  • Composition-pattern docs live under ui-catalogue as one doc per pattern.
  • Historical change notes belong in Site Change Log.

Migration Targets

Move stable framework material here when it describes:

  • interaction defaults
  • DOM hook rules
  • route state and progressive enhancement principles
  • shared modal, status, list, panel, control, and feedback rules at framework level
  • guidance that applies across more than one page family

Move primitive-specific details into matching primitive docs, for example:

  • Button Primitive
  • Input Primitive
  • List Primitive
  • Panel Primitive

Move lifecycle and multi-part UI behavior into composition-pattern docs, for example:

  • Reopenable Command Result Pattern
  • Column Links Pattern

Current Status

This doc is a migration target, not yet the full consolidated framework.

Until the migration is complete:

  • use UI Framework for existing site-wide interaction defaults
  • use Studio UI Framework for existing Studio primitive and modal guidance
  • promote durable guidance from Studio UI Rules And Decision Log into this doc or the matching primitive/pattern doc before retiring that guidance from the decision log
